stemHtml:
For an IFR flight from the departure aerodrome A to the destination aerodrome B, the reduced contingency fuel has been applied, considering a Decision Point DP and an optional refuel destination C. Given the following information, how much Trip Fuel is required?

Distance from A to B: 2100 NM
Distance from A to C: 1150 NM
Distance from A to DP: 980 NM
TAS: 410 kt
Fuel flow: 2800 kg/h
Tailwind Component: 12 kt
